LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-DEFENDANT CELESTIAL ASIA SECURITIES HOLDINGS' LIMITED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - THE MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE BY RELIANCE ON THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS THAT ESTABLISH THAT CASH DID NOT RECEIVE ANY TRANSFER OF ASSETS, AN ESSENTIAL ELEMENT OF EACH OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION. CROSS-COMPLAINANT FAILS TO RAISE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT FOR THE OPPOSITION IS BASED ON THE CONTENTION THAT THE DISCOVERY ORDER WOULD BE VACATED. THE OPPOSITION WAS FILED LATE AND THE EXPLANATION FOR THE DELAY IN FILING IS PROBLEMATIC. IN ADDITION, THE COURT STRIKES THE OPPOSITION AS BEING UNTIMELY FILED. CROSS-DEFENDANT REQUESTED RULING ON ITS EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS & THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. CROSS-DEFENDANT TO PREPARE PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J.
